# Copilot Instructions (Workshop)

This repository uses `AGENTS.md` as the primary behavior contract.

Before changing code:
- Read `AGENTS.md`.
- Follow its "Non-negotiable workflow" exactly.
- Keep diffs minimal and in-scope.
- Run `./scripts/quality_gate.sh` after each change and iterate until it passes.

If you are unsure, prefer the safer/smaller change and explain tradeoffs.
